implementation_blocked_reason: Spec-first gate: spec artifacts are complete but architectural and security review tasks (T11, T12) must complete before implementation begins. T00 (rename) is also a prerequisite.

ADR-M6-01.question: ACA as default deployment path vs AKS

ADR-M6-02.question: Azure Monitor OTLP endpoint vs Log Analytics direct ingestion

ADR-M6-03.question: Managed identity assignment strategy: user-assigned vs system-assigned per container app

dependencies.notes: M6 Task 0 (T00) depends on Ashley approval of Agent Execution Service naming. All implementation tasks depend on T00 completing (rename) and T11+T12 review sign-offs.

notes: Spec 006 created by Tank (Azure/Terraform/DevOps) as M6 spec-first gate artifact.
Approved component name: Agent Execution Service (slug: agent-execution). M6 Task 0 (T00) performs the filesystem and Compose rename.
ACA is the default deployment path per roadmap and Tank charter. AKS optional path from M5 remains available as an advanced track.
No terraform apply in any public CI workflow. CI validates only (fmt + validate).
All placeholder values must use {tenant-id}, {subscription-id}, {resource-group} brace tokens or all-zero GUIDs only.
Azure Monitor tracing is a config-only OTLP endpoint swap — no code change from M5 OTEL instrumentation.
AUTH_MODE=strict is the deployment gate: no fixture headers accepted, no mock tokens, real JWKS validation required.
